remarks: Welcome to this inviting 3/4-bedroom, 2-bath Cape Cod nestled in Stamford's highly desirable Turn of River neighborhood! The moment you step inside, you'll feel the warmth and comfort of this thoughtfully designed home.  Main level features a spacious bedroom, a beautifully updated full bathroom, a bright and welcoming living room, a dining room, and a large family room with a cozy wood-burning stove-perfect for entertaining or relaxing with family and friends. There's an added flexible bonus room that can easily serve as a home office, nursery, or playroom, providing the perfect combination of space and versatility. The functional kitchen offers plenty of workspace and flows seamlessly into the main living areas.  Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms, an updated full bathroom.  Step outside to your own private backyard retreat! The beautifully landscaped yard features a brick paver patio with a built-in fire pit-ideal for summer barbecues, outdoor entertaining, or cozy evenings under the stars.  The oversized one-car garage offers abundant storage space, including a large loft above. As an added bonus, the home is equipped with a solar panel system that helps reduce energy costs by generating electricity.  Conveniently located just minutes from shopping, restaurants, schools, Merritt Parkway, and downtown Stamford, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience. Don't miss the opportunity to make this gem your next home!
